programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Hedgie Hound: When out in the neighbourhood, Pins and Nettie hear some unsettling noise coming from behind a fence.
It's Time for a Surprise: Great-Gran Gran shows JoJo an old family photo. It's fun spotting Gran Gran, Mummy and Great-Gran Gran when they were younger.
It's Time to Play Schools: The cousins turn Gran Gran's living room into a classroom ready for Lexi to become a teacher.
When the Magic Harp breaks and won't stop playing, it's up to Banba to help fix it and restore harmony back to on Fairy Island.
When Rua takes her friends on a nighttime adventure to see a shooting star, Ameer learns to overcome his fear of the dark with a little help from a new friend.
Fun and games with the animals of the forest.
Attack of the Nom Noms: Adam and the crew answer an S.O.S. from Crumblor, leader of the Nom Noms - an alien race that look just like chocolate-chip cookies, and solve a mystery- of the heart!
One Fix Too Many: When the crew discovers an eager fixer-bot named Nib on a mysterious asteroid, his compulsive 'improvements' nearly ruin their ship.
Doodle Girl boogies down with a troupe of dancing plants! But when their leaves get overgrown, she's got to style these fabulous flowers into groovy new versions of themselves.
The Pumpkin Patch Party: The Mixmups go on an adventure to have the best Halloween party ever but one little Wingle isn't joining in.
Popcorn's Spooky Surprise: When Popcorn is afraid of a spooky corn maze, Vida helps him conquer his fear of the unknown.
Fergie's Favourite Things: When a sudden allergy means Fergie can't pick apples, Vida sets up a 'Fergie Tree!'
Rock'n Road Race: There's no build too big & no problem too small for these two twins.
Carlos Gets a Bike: There's no build too big & no problem too small for these two twins.
Hannah and Norman plan the perfect Pontypandy pool party for Peter's birthday. However, after the buildings by the swimming pool catch fire, the rescue team must save the day.
James looks for a thief who has been stealing fish from his mum. On realising that his prime suspect is a seal, he seeks Jodie's help.
The children play a recycling game. The crew build their own sorting machine. Amy takes Zoom to the place where our recycling goes to meet a lot of sorting machines. (SL)
Zoom orders green cake in a cafe that tries not to waste food. The children put food in bottles to show how it makes gas - great for balloons but not so good for the planet! (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Cake It Easy: Before the beginning of the much-anticipated Sodor Cake Festival, Thomas and Diesel are assigned the important job of delivering the cakes to the contest in Vicarstown.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Can Do Crew: When Whiff has to spend the day running errands, he leaves Sandy in charge of the Recycling Plant.
Andy travels back 65 million years to the time of the Tyrannosaurus Rex to record the sound of its roar, but it means getting up close to the predator.
Punky and Niamh are best friends and they like to share things with each other. Cranky tells them that borrowing is a bad idea.
Tá Sonia ar bís dul chuig an trá ach níl sí sásta go bhfuil turas fada i gceist.
Déanann Hugo agus Sonia dearmad rud éigin speisialta a chur isteach i bpacáiste Mhamó.
It's Gull's birthday, and after Lily finds a message in a bottle on the beach, they have fun following a mysterious trail of clues around the bay.
Lily finds Salty's pocket watch and promises to look after it for him, but the watch is snatched from her hand by the passing Clickety Clackety train.
Lá breá gréine eile é i mBaile Gach Aon Lá agus tá Mya an-sceitimíneach i dtaobh rud éigin...! Tá greannán Mya ag teacht inniu, Betsy Bríomhar!
Lá breá gréine eile é i mBaile Gach Aon Lá agus tá Mya is a cairde ar thuras scoile chuig an músaem le foghlaim faoi Lochlannaigh.
Maidin chiúin eile í i mBaile Gach Aon Lá...Ó, ciúnas thart! Measaim go bhfuil oibreacha bóthair ar siúl amuigh.
Nelly and Nora try to make the cows stand up, so Dad won't think it's going to rain.
The mists roll in at the camping park, and things become so foggy that Nelly and Nora almost need a boat.
Chalk Streams: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how chalk streams play an important role in their environment.
Hedgie Hound: When out in the neighbourhood, Pins and Nettie hear some unsettling noise coming from behind a fence.
Henry goes to a sweet shop to buy a box of chocolates for his Mother. He meets a Box of Chocolates so tasty that someone has eaten them all!
Rock'n Road Race: There's no build too big & no problem too small for these two twins.
Carlos Gets a Bike: There's no build too big & no problem too small for these two twins.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: The annual town-wide hide and seek contest is here. The family always hides together, but Girl points out that Boy is terrible at hiding and is bound to cause them to lose.
Everyone knows a cow moos, a dog woofs and a bird tweets but Lucy and Blaze can't agree on whether a frog croaks or ribbits! There's only one way to find out.
The children play a recycling game. The crew build their own sorting machine. Amy takes Zoom to the place where our recycling goes to meet a lot of sorting machines. (SL)
Zoom orders green cake in a cafe that tries not to waste food. The children put food in bottles to show how it makes gas - great for balloons but not so good for the planet! (SL)

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Earth Explorers
programmes.show_description: Geysers: Nina is taken to see Old Faithful in Yellowstone National Park as she and Ollie investigate geysers.
When the Magic Harp breaks and won't stop playing, it's up to Banba to help fix it and restore harmony back to on Fairy Island.
When Rua takes her friends on a nighttime adventure to see a shooting star, Ameer learns to overcome his fear of the dark with a little help from a new friend.

It's Time to Play Schools: The cousins turn Gran Gran's living room into a classroom ready for Lexi to become a teacher.
The Wee Littles are set up for an evening around a campfire, toasting a marshmallow and excited as Teensy is going to play some songs until one of his guitar strings breaks!!

programmes.show_description: The annual town-wide hide and seek contest is here. The family always hides together, but Girl points out that Boy is terrible at hiding and is bound to cause them to lose.
Fun and games with the animals of the forest.

programmes.show_name: Nina and the Neurons: Earth Explorers
programmes.show_description: Geysers: Nina is taken to see Old Faithful in Yellowstone National Park as she and Ollie investigate geysers.
Henry goes to a sweet shop to buy a box of chocolates for his Mother. He meets a Box of Chocolates so tasty that someone has eaten them all!
Feadóg Mhór: Ba mhaith le BaBa ceol cosúil le MeMo a sheinm ar an bhfheadóg mhór. Spreagann MeMo í agus go luath bíonn sí in ann nóta deas a bhualadh.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Programmes Start at 07:00.
Hedgie Veggie: The Narrator brought some freshly grown carrots from her garden for Pins and Nettie to try.
It's Time to Look for Signs: On the way home from Jared's shop with Gran Gran, JoJo finds out about the signs around them and what they mean.
It's Time to Hear an Orchestra: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Isaiah at the concert hall. The orchestra are going to play Captain Chloe music and Isaiah's daddy Joshua has a clarinet solo.
Ameer thinks his pirate costume isn't special enough, but with help from friends, he creates one that shows his true self - and shines at the big show in Pip's Café.
When CheepCheep hurts her leg on Sports Day, the fairies turn her nest into a pop-up café - so everyone gets a break, and CheepCheep stays part of the fun.
Fun and games with the animals of the forest.
Comet Chameleon: During a spacewalk Zuzu doesn't believe that Bubby heard some singing coming from a passing comet, but there's more to this comet than meets the eye!
Rocky Restart: After Bubby accidentally wipes Shelby's memory, Zuzu thinks she can bypass Shelby's security systems and straighten things out - if Bubby can distract Shelby long enough...
Hold it! Doodle Girl is on trial for the worst crime in the Royal Kingdom of Veggietalbion, liking sprouts!
The Wide Awake Moon: The Mixmups go on a nighttime adventure to try and stay awake more than the moon, but the harder they try, the sleepier they become.
Baby Mouse's Teething Troubles: When the Mouse Family is exhausted by Baby's crying, Vida discovers that she's teething!
Tidbit's Stingy Sunburn: Vida soothes Tidbit's sunburn when fun in the sun distracts him from reapplying sunscreen.
Ghost of Steamport School: As Halloween approaches, the Dream Factory team builds a ghost hunter to display at the school's Halloween party.
Haunted Train: The Dream Factory Crew are helping Mayor Murthy relocate Steamport's famous - and supposedly haunted - old steam engine, when the train mysteriously chugs off.
Norman and Peter try to fetch Woolly and Lambykins for the Pontypandy Animal Parade but end up losing the lamb in a gully.
After they see Hannah's dad attempt to use his Rocket Blaster 3000, Norman and Hannah try to record a webcast based on grown-ups doing silly things.
The children try not to get wet while showing Zoom how warm water rises and cold water sinks. Mark takes Zoom to visit a place that tests if waves can make electricity! (SL)
Zoom finds out about farming, how sprinklers help if there's no rain and how food waste can be used to make fertiliser. Ends with a visit to a planet-protecting farm. (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Pizza Picnic Problem: Sir Topham Hatt's plans for a kazoo concert in the park go awry, so Thomas uses creative solutions to help him.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Travels with Terence: After Terence the Tractor breaks a tread trying to keep up with Thomas and Kana, the engines take him to Sandy for a quick fix.
Andy Day travels back 145 million years and befriends an allosaurus, a meat-eating dinosaur that roamed the prehistoric salt flats of North America.
Punky's favorite colour is yellow and, when Mum decides to decorate the kitchen, Punky gets the idea to make everything yellow.
Níl báid pháipéir Hugo agus Sonia ag dul sa treo ceart go dtí go n-oibríonn siad amach treo na gaoithe.
Tá an t-léine is fearr le Sonia róbheag di anois ach tá sí sásta gur féidir léi í a thabhairt do Mhel.
It's Gull's birthday, and after Lily finds a message in a bottle on the beach, they have fun following a mysterious trail of clues around the bay.
When Bull discovers he has lost his precious bedtime scarf he goes bonkers! So Lily goes looking for it. Can she find it and restore peace to the bay?
Is maidin gheal eile é i mbaile Gach Aon Lá... Oh, cá bhfuil Gach Aon Lá? Is dócha go bhfuil sé áit éigin faoin sneachta sin.
Is lá breá gréine eile é i mBaile Gach Aon Lá... is ta Mya Go ag dul le Dada Go chuig a oifig.
Is lá breá gréine eile é i mbaile Gach Aon Lá. Is tá Mya is a cairde ag tosú lá eile ar scoil! Tá duine tar éis teacht ó thír eile chun cónaí anseo i nGach Aon Lá.
The sisters try to take the perfect camping park family photo.
On a cloudless night, Nelly and Nora help Mrs Bonner search for her cat Morris. Animation about the adventures of two sisters at a seaside camping park.
Nanni can't get everything to fit in one box, Kiva, Saul and Angus must find a clever way to save Nanni a second trip.
The Wee Littles decide to create their own game from a strange round fuzzy thing they find on the way home.
Hedgie Veggie: The Narrator brought some freshly grown carrots from her garden for Pins and Nettie to try.
Henry meets a lamp.
Ghost of Steamport School: As Halloween approaches, the Dream Factory team builds a ghost hunter to display at the school's Halloween party.
Haunted Train: The Dream Factory Crew are helping Mayor Murthy relocate Steamport's famous - and supposedly haunted - old steam engine, when the train mysteriously chugs off.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: Cat becomes obsessed with winning a soft toy elephant at the arcade. However, the greedy Smith twins are playing the games meant for little kids and winning every single prize.
Lucy and Blaze are playing with the playroom express, a new steam train set they got as a present. It makes them wonder what it must have been like to enjoy a ride on a steam train
The children try not to get wet while showing Zoom how warm water rises and cold water sinks. Mark takes Zoom to visit a place that tests if waves can make electricity! (SL)
Zoom finds out about farming, how sprinklers help if there's no rain and how food waste can be used to make fertiliser. Ends with a visit to a planet-protecting farm. (SL)

programmes.show_description: Loch Ness: Nina investigates whether Loch Ness has always looked the same, with the help of Felix, her touch neuron.

Damhsa: Is breá le MeMo a bheith ag damhsa. Ba mhaith le BaBa damhsa a dhéanamh ach is doiligh di céimeanna MeMo a leanúint.
